ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes the app instance. Prefer to use this over the global app instance.
ast.target: 此模組公開 app 實例。建議優先使用它，而不是全域 app 實例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes custom made scripts, written by yourself within the script file folder location
ast.target: 此模組會公開你在腳本檔案資料夾位置中自行撰寫的自訂腳本

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to dates.
ast.target: 此模組包含所有與日期相關的內部函式。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD"`. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期格式。預設為 `"YYYY-MM-DD"`。請參考 [Momentjs 格式說明](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Duration to offset the date from. If a number is provided, duration will be added to the date in days. You can also specify the offset as a string using the ISO 8601 format.
ast.target: 要套用到日期的偏移量。若提供數字，會以天數加到日期上；也可以使用 ISO 8601 格式的字串指定偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The date to use instead of today's date, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 要用來取代今天日期的日期，例如可以設為筆記標題。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the reference date. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 參考日期的格式。請參考 [Momentjs 格式參考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得明天的日期。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得昨天的日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Week day number. If the locale assigns Monday as the first day of the week, `0` will be Monday, `-7` will be last week's day.
ast.target: 星期幾編號。如果地區設定以星期一為一週的第一天，`0` 代表星期一，`-7` 代表上週同一天。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reference date to use instead of today, e.g. set this to the note's title.
ast.target: 要用來取代今天的參考日期，例如可以設為筆記標題。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module contains every internal function related to files.
ast.target: 此模組包含所有與檔案相關的內部函式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".
ast.target: 新檔案的檔名，預設為 "Untitled"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file.
ast.target: 是否開啟新建立的檔案。警告：如果使用此選項，由於命令是非同步執行，檔案可能會先被開啟，接著其他命令會附加到新檔案，而不是原本的檔案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The folder to put the new file in, defaults to Obsidian's default location. If you want the file to appear in a different folder, specify it with `"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME"` or `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath("PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME")`.
ast.target: 新檔案要放入的資料夾。預設使用 Obsidian 的預設位置。如果想讓檔案出現在不同資料夾，請用 `"PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME"` 或 `tp.app.vault.getAbstractFileByPath("PATH/TO/FOLDERNAME")` 指定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the current file's creation date.
ast.target: 取得目前檔案的建立日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`. Refer to [format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).
ast.target: 日期格式。預設為 `"YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm"`。請參考[格式說明](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The order of the different cursors jump, e.g. it will jump from 1 to 2 to 3, and so on.
If you specify multiple tp.file.cursor with the same order, the editor will switch to multi-cursor.
ast.target:
不同游標的跳轉順序，例如會從 1 跳到 2，再跳到 3，以此類推。
如果指定多個相同順序的 tp.file.cursor，編輯器會切換為多游標模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Appends some content after the active cursor in the file.
ast.target: 在檔案中目前游標後方附加內容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content to append after the active cursor.
ast.target: 要附加到目前游標後方的內容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Check to see if a file exists by it's file path. The full path to the file, relative to the Vault and containing the extension, must be provided.
ast.target: 透過檔案路徑檢查檔案是否存在。必須提供相對於 Vault、且包含副檔名的完整檔案路徑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The full file path of the file we want to check existence for.
ast.target: 要檢查是否存在的檔案完整路徑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Search for a file and returns its `TFile` instance.
ast.target: 搜尋檔案並回傳其 `TFile` 實例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The filename we want to search and resolve as a `TFile`.
ast.target: 我們要搜尋並解析為 `TFile` 的檔名。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得檔案的資料夾名稱。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, returns the vault-absolute path of the folder. If `false`, only returns the basename of the folder (the last part). Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果設為 `true`，會回傳資料夾的 vault 絕對路徑。如果設為 `false`，只會回傳資料夾的基底名稱（最後一部分）。預設為 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The link to the file to include, e.g. `"[[MyFile]]"`, or a TFile object. Also supports sections or blocks inclusions.
ast.target: 要包含的檔案連結，例如 `"[[MyFile]]"`，或 TFile 物件。也支援包含區段或區塊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's last modification date.
ast.target: 取得檔案的最後修改日期。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Moves the file to the desired vault location.
ast.target: 將檔案移動到指定的 vault 位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The new vault relative path of the file, without the file extension. Note: the new path needs to include the folder and the filename, e.g. `"/Notes/MyNote"`.
ast.target: 檔案新的 vault 相對路徑，不含副檔名。注意：新路徑必須包含資料夾和檔名，例如 `"/Notes/MyNote"`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The file to move, defaults to the current file.
ast.target: 要移動的檔案，預設為目前檔案。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, only retrieves the vault's relative path.
ast.target: 如果設為 `true`，只取得 vault 的相對路徑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renames the file (keeps the same file extension).
ast.target: 重新命名檔案（保留相同副檔名）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 新檔案標題。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the active file's text selection.
ast.target: 取得目前檔案的文字選取範圍。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the file's tags (array of string).
ast.target: 取得檔案的標籤（字串陣列）。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得檔案標題。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules exposes all the frontmatter variables of a file as variables.
ast.target: 此模組會將檔案中的所有 frontmatter 變數公開為變數。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This module exposes all the functions and classes from the Obsidian API.
ast.target: 此模組公開 Obsidian API 中的所有函式與類別。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 取得剪貼簿內容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Spawns a prompt modal and returns the user's input.
ast.target: 開啟提示彈窗並回傳使用者輸入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed above the input field.
ast.target: 放在輸入欄位上方的文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A default value for the input field.
ast.target: 輸入欄位的預設值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Throws an error if the prompt is canceled, instead of returning a `null` value.
ast.target: 如果取消提示，會拋出錯誤，而不是回傳 `null` 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to `true`, the input field will be a multiline textarea. Defaults to `false`.
ast.target: 如果設為 `true`，輸入欄位會變成多行文字區域。預設為 `false`。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 提示的佔位符字串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default value to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 建議選單初始化時使用的預設值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text placed at the top of the modal.
ast.target: 放在彈窗頂端的文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default values to initialize the suggester with.
ast.target: 建議選單初始化時使用的預設值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This modules contains every internal function related to the web (making web requests).
ast.target: 此模組包含所有與網路相關的內部函式（發送網路請求）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves and parses the daily quote from `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` as a callout.
ast.target: 從 `https://github.com/Zachatoo/quotes-database` 取得並解析每日引言，作為 callout。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 從 `https://unsplash.com/` 取得一張隨機圖片。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 圖片大小，格式為 `<width>x<height>`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Limits selection to photos matching a search term. Multiple search terms can be passed separated by a comma.
ast.target: 只選取符合搜尋字詞的照片。可用逗號分隔多個搜尋字詞。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional argument to include the specified size in the image link markdown. Defaults to false.
ast.target: 選用引數，用於在圖片連結 Markdown 中包含指定尺寸。預設為 false。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes a HTTP request to the specified URL. Optionally, you can specify a path to extract specific data from the response.
ast.target: 向指定 URL 發送 HTTP 請求。也可以指定路徑，從回應中提取特定資料。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URL to which the HTTP request will be made.
ast.target: HTTP 請求要發送到的 URL。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A path within the response JSON to extract specific data.
ast.target: 回應 JSON 中用來提取特定資料的路徑。

regex.source: description:"Open the created file in the UI"
regex.target: description:"在介面中開啟建立的檔案"

regex.source: description:"This module exposes the app instance. Prefer to use this over the global app instance."
regex.target: description:"此模組公開 app 實例。建議優先使用它，而不是全域 app 實例。"

regex.source: description:"This module exposes custom made scripts, written by yourself within the script file folder location"
regex.target: description:"此模組會公開你在腳本檔案資料夾位置中自行撰寫的自訂腳本"

regex.source: description:"This module contains every internal function related to dates."
regex.target: description:"此模組包含所有與日期相關的內部函式。"
description:"取得日期。"

regex.source: description:'The format for the date. Defaults to `"YYYY-MM-DD"`. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/).'
regex.target: description:'日期格式。預設為 `"YYYY-MM-DD"`。請參考 [Momentjs 格式說明](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。'

regex.source: description:"Duration to offset the date from. If a number is provided, duration will be added to the date in days. You can also specify the offset as a string using the ISO 8601 format."
regex.target: description:"要套用到日期的偏移量。若提供數字，會以天數加到日期上；也可以使用 ISO 8601 格式的字串指定偏移量。"

regex.source: description:"The date to use instead of today's date, e.g. set this to the note's title."
regex.target: description:"要用來取代今天日期的日期，例如可以設為筆記標題。"

regex.source: description:"The format for the reference date. Refer to the [Momentjs format reference](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)."
regex.target: description:"參考日期的格式。請參考 [Momentjs 格式參考](https://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/)。"
name:"目前日期"
name:"目前日期 with format"
name:"上週"
name:"下週"
name:"上個月"
name:"明年"
name:"檔案標題日期 + 1 天（明天）"
name:"檔案標題日期 - 1 天（昨天）"
description:"取得明天的日期。"
name:"明天日期"
name:"以指定格式取得明天日期"
description:"取得昨天的日期。"
name:"昨天日期"
name:"以指定格式取得昨天日期"

regex.source: description:"Week day number. If the locale assigns Monday as the first day of the week, `0` will be Monday, `-7` will be last week's day."
regex.target: description:"星期幾編號。如果地區設定以星期一為一週的第一天，`0` 代表星期一，`-7` 代表上週同一天。"

regex.source: description:"The reference date to use instead of today, e.g. set this to the note's title."
regex.target: description:"要用來取代今天的參考日期，例如可以設為筆記標題。"
name:"本週一"
name:"下週一"
name:"檔案標題日期的星期一"
name:"檔案標題日期的前一個星期一"

regex.target: name:"從筆記標題取得月份結束日期"

regex.source: description:'The filename of the new file, defaults to "Untitled".'
regex.target: description:'新檔案的檔名，預設為 "Untitled"。'

regex.source: description:"Whether to open or not the newly created file. Warning: if you use this option, since commands are executed asynchronously, the file can be opened first and then other commands are appended to that new file and not the previous file."
regex.target: description:"是否開啟新建立的檔案。警告：如果使用此選項，由於命令是非同步執行，檔案可能會先被開啟，接著其他命令會附加到新檔案，而不是原本的檔案。"

regex.source: description:'The folder to put the new file in, defaults to Obsidian\'

regex.source:
description:`The order of the different cursors jump, e.g. it will jump from 1 to 2 to 3, and so on.
If you specify multiple tp.file.cursor with the same order, the editor will switch to multi-cursor.
`
regex.target:
description:`不同游標的跳轉順序，例如會從 1 跳到 2，再跳到 3，以此類推。
如果指定多個相同順序的 tp.file.cursor，編輯器會切換為多游標模式。
`
name:"檔案游標"
name:"檔案多游標"
